text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass meeting room feels almost ceremonial in its transparency, inviting dialogue yet separating inside from out. The R+D display stimulates my thoughts on progress and human ingenuity—how ideas, once ephemeral, become part of our visual and conceptual world. I feel both a slight detachment, like an observer at the threshold of discovery, and a quiet excitement, sensing the pulse of creativity all around me.
